title: Senior SEO Specialist at Lenskart Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Lenskart Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lenskart Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About Lenskart Digital Technologies:
Lenskart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenskart Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
